item.title: SalesLoop：基于表现反馈强化学习的销售线索排序
item.summary: arXiv:2607.20655v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Lead ranking in Customer Relationship Management (CRM) systems faces a persistent challenge: models achieving high offline accuracy often underperform in production.
